title: kexec-tools  bug fix update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[2.0.31-1.0.2]
- Fix failure to trigger kdump environment on panic [Orabug: 38537007]
- Handle building for kernels without KEXEC_LOAD_DEBUG flag [Orabug: 38551849]
